top.name: Time Lord
top.rules_text: Permanent: at the start of each turn you may rewind OR fast-forward any one event (spell resolution unit death unit movement). Rewind undoes it. Fast-forward makes it resolve immediately.

channel.name: Time Lord (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: May rewind OR fast-forward 2 events per turn

bottom.name: Entropy
bottom.rules_text: Imbue every tile on the board with Temporal Decay: all units (including allies) lose 4HP per turn. Your spells gain +2 damage for each turn this has been active. Lasts rest of fight.

channel.name: Entropy (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Only enemies take Temporal Decay damage
